name: Thumpback
description: Thumpback is a whale-like behemoth who is one of the eight Giants in Skylanders: Giants. He was a former pirate whose passion for fishing led him to the Skylanders.
biography: Thumpback was once a crew member of The Phantom Tide, the most fearsome pirate ship in all of Skylands. But the actual pirating part about being a pirate didn't interest Thumpback so much as the benefits that came with traveling on a large ship. After all, his real passion was fishing. But when his chance came to finally ensnare the most elusive creature in the sky - the Leviathan Cloud Crab - he was pulled over board and carried off into the horizon. This was actually quite fortunate, because sometime later The Phantom Tide and its entire crew were banished to the Chest of Exile. Thumpback's pirating days were over, but his legend as one of the first Skylanders had only just begun.
personality: Thumpback is steadfast, dependable, trustworthy, and gifted with the patience of an angler. He is a jolly but formidable ally.

story.content: Thumpback was once a fearsome member of a pirate crew on board a very large ship. They sailed the seas, shivering their timbers and looking for treasure. But Thumpback's real passion was fishing. When he tried to catch the legendary Leviathan Cloud Crab, he was dragged across the sky and separated from his crew. This saved him from being banished with them. He eventually joined the Giants to protect Skylands from the Arkeyans.

content: Whoo-hoo! Oh, big and mighty numbers!
Ooh! Not bad. I hope it fits my big head.

trivia: It is rumored that six fully grown Skylanders could fit inside Thumpback's mouth.
Thumpback is based on a Humpback Whale, but has pointed teeth unlike real ones.
His name is a portmanteau of 'Thump' and 'Humpback'.
He speaks with a thick Scottish accent in the game.
Thumpback, Ninjini, and Crusher are the only three Giants with external weapons.
In early development, he was tentatively named 'Big Mouth Whale'.
gameplay: Thumpback is a powerful, slow-moving Giant who excels at area-of-effect attacks using his massive anchor. His Anchor Assault allows for sweeping strikes, while his Belly Flop provides a mobility option that doubles as an attack. He can also bite enemies and spray water using his blowhole. His high health and reach make him a formidable tank.

basic.name: Anchor Assault
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swing Thumpback's anchor at enemies. Press Attack 1, Attack 1, Hold Attack 1 for a special combo!

basic.name: Belly Flop
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to dive into a belly flop, damaging enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: A Whale Of A Chomp
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 for a big, whale-sized chomp.

basic_upgrades.name: Slippery Belly
basic_upgrades.content: Slide longer after a belly flop and do increased damage.

soulgems.name: Blowhard
soulgems.content: While belly sliding, press Attack 1 to spray water and starfish.

abilities.name: Thumpback Combos
abilities.content: Unlock Power Swing and Whirlpool Ripper combos.
